headline: How The Allegion (ALLE) Story Is Shifting As Margin Questions Temper Earlier Optimism
summary: Allegion is back in focus as Street price targets have been trimmed in recent weeks, with some moving from US$190 to US$180 and from US$187 to US$180, even while one model keeps Fair Value unchanged at US$179.55. Those changes reflect how analysts are weighing near term margin pressure in the Americas against recent reports of margin strength and a demand backdrop tied to artificial intelligence related orders. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving...
